body.title: D327 Phase 2: openrouter_reasoner → inference_openrouter.py
body.result: Phase 2 merged into Phase 1 — inference_openrouter.py created with re-exports from openrouter_reasoner.py. Both main.py and inference_gateway.py migrated. 1875 tests pass.
body.description: Move openrouter_reasoner.py to inference_openrouter.py. Strip model names — all model selection via cfg/tier. Update all imports. Tests must pass.
